sso-auth-initiate->sso-idp-config.why: Initiating the handshake needs the org's registered IdP endpoints/credentials.

sso-assertion-callback->sso-idp-config.why: Validating the assertion needs the IdP's signing certificate/JWKS and audience config.

sso-assertion-callback->sso-auth-initiat.why: The callback validates the state/nonce produced when the handshake was initiated.

sso-assertion-callback->user-model.why: A validated assertion provisions or matches a user record.

session-establish->sso-assertion-callbac.why: A session is only established after the assertion is validated.

session-establish->user-model.why: The session is bound to the resolved user identity.

session-validate-middleware->session-est.why: Middleware validates the session token/cookie that establishment issues.

sign-out->session-establish.why: Sign-out destroys the session that was established.

auth-ui->sso-auth-initiate.why: The sign-in UI triggers the SSO initiation flow.

auth-ui->sign-out.why: The UI exposes the sign-out control.

team-model->org-model.why: Teams are nested under an organization.

org-membership-model->org-model.why: Membership links a user into an organization.

org-create->org-model.why: Creating an org writes the org record.

team-manage->team-model.why: Team management operates on team records.

team-manage->org-membership-model.why: Placing members on teams operates on membership.

invite-model->org-model.why: An invitation belongs to an organization.

invite-create->invite-model.why: Creating an invite writes an invitation record.

invite-email-send->invite-create.why: The email is sent for the invitation that was created.

invite-email-send->invite-model.why: The email carries the invitation token from the record.

invite-accept->invite-model.why: Acceptance validates and consumes the invitation token.

invite-ui->invite-accept.why: The accept landing page drives acceptance.

org-create->org-membership-model.why: Creating an org makes the creator the first member/owner.

role-model->org-membership-model.why: Roles attach to an org membership.

permission-model->role-model.why: Permission mapping is defined over roles.

role-assignment->org-membership-model.why: Role assignment operates on a membership record.

authz-enforcement-middleware->session-va.why: Authorization needs the authenticated principal resolved by session validation.

authz-ui-gating->role-model.why: The UI gates affordances on the viewer's role.

tenant-scoping->org-membership-model.why: Scoping resolves the principal's org from their membership.

invite-create->session-validate-middlewa.why: Only an authenticated principal can send an invite.

invite-create->authz-enforcement-middlew.why: Only owners/admins may invite; the action is authorization-gated.

invite-accept->sso-assertion-callback.why: Acceptance must bind to a verified SSO identity for the invited email.

invite-accept->user-model.why: Acceptance ties the invite to the accepting user identity.

invite-accept->role-model.why: The membership created on accept is assigned the invited role.

member-remove->authz-enforcement-middlew.why: Removing a member is an owner/admin-only people-management action.

role-assignment->authz-enforcement-middl.why: Changing roles is an owner/admin-only action.

team-manage->authz-enforcement-middlewar.why: Managing teams is a privileged org-management action.

roster-read->tenant-scoping.why: Roster reads must be scoped to the caller's org.

roster-read->session-validate-middleware.why: Reading the roster requires an authenticated principal.

invite-ui->app-shell-ui.why: The invite management UI lives inside the authenticated app shell.

invite-ui->authz-ui-gating.why: The invite affordance is shown only to owners/admins.

roster-read->authz-enforcement-middlewar.why: Reading the roster is org/people-management gated server-side.

project-model->org-model.why: Projects are nested under an organization.

project-create->project-model.why: Creating a project writes the project record.

project-membership->project-model.why: Project access is defined against a project.

project-membership->org-membership-model.why: Only org members can be on a project.

task-create->task-model.why: Creating a task writes a task record.

task-create->project-membership.why: A member creates a task only within a project they have access to.

task-assign->project-membership.why: A task may only be assigned to someone with project access.

project-task-ui->task-read.why: The UI lists projects and tasks.

project-create->session-validate-middlew.why: Creating a project requires an authenticated principal.

project-create->tenant-scoping.why: Projects are created within the caller's org only.

task-create->session-validate-middleware.why: Creating a task requires an authenticated principal.

task-create->authz-enforcement-middlewar.why: Task creation is permission-gated to members with project access.

task-assign->org-membership-model.why: The assignee must be a member of the org.

task-read->tenant-scoping.why: Task reads are scoped to the caller's org/project access.

project-task-ui->app-shell-ui.why: Project/task views live in the authenticated app shell.

project-task-ui->authz-ui-gating.why: Task affordances reflect the viewer's permissions.

file-model->task-model.why: An attachment links to a task.

file-upload->file-storage.why: Upload stores the file bytes in object storage.

file-av-scan->file-upload.why: Scanning runs against the uploaded bytes.

file-av-scan->file-storage.why: The scanner reads the stored object.

file-download->file-storage.why: Download streams bytes from object storage.

file-download->file-av-scan.why: Files are only downloadable after passing the AV scan.

file-upload->authz-enforcement-middlewar.why: Attaching to a task requires permission on that task's project.

file-upload->project-membership.why: Only people with project access can attach files to its tasks.

file-download->authz-enforcement-middlew.why: Every download re-checks authorization for the file's task/project.

file-download->tenant-scoping.why: Downloads are scoped so no cross-tenant file access is possible.

file-ui->project-task-ui.why: File attachments are surfaced within task detail.

audit-event-write->audit-log-model.why: Writing audit events appends to the audit log.

audit-log-read->audit-log-model.why: Review reads from the audit log.

audit-log-ui->audit-log-read.why: The review UI calls the read surface.

audit-event-write->invite-accept.why: Joining (accept) is a compliance-relevant event to audit.

audit-event-write->member-remove.why: Leaving/removal is a compliance-relevant event to audit.

audit-event-write->role-assignment.why: Role changes are compliance-relevant events to audit.

audit-event-write->task-edit.why: Changes to work are compliance-relevant events to audit.

audit-event-write->task-complete.why: Completing work is a compliance-relevant change to audit.

audit-event-write->file-download.why: Access to files is a compliance-relevant event to audit.

audit-event-write->file-upload.why: Adding files to work is a compliance-relevant event to audit.

audit-event-write->billing-webhook-handl.why: Billing events are compliance-relevant and must be audited.

audit-event-write->session-establish.why: Sign-in is a security-relevant event to audit.

audit-log-read->authz-enforcement-middle.why: Audit review is restricted to owners/admins.

audit-log-read->tenant-scoping.why: Audit review only shows the caller's own org.

audit-log-ui->app-shell-ui.why: The audit UI lives in the authenticated app shell.

notification-ui->notification-inapp-deli.why: The notification center renders in-app notifications.

notification-ui->activity-feed-read.why: The UI renders the activity feed.

activity-event-model->task-assign.why: Assigning a task is an activity event source.

activity-event-model->task-comment.why: A comment is an activity event source.

activity-event-model->task-edit.why: A project/task update is an activity event source.

activity-event-model->invite-accept.why: An accepted invite is an activity event source.

notification-fanout->org-membership-mode.why: Fanout decides recipients from org/team membership.

notification-fanout->project-membership.why: Fanout targets the people with access to the relevant project.

notification-email-deliver->user-model.why: Email delivery needs the recipient's email address.

activity-feed-read->tenant-scoping.why: The feed is scoped to the caller's org/project access.

activity-feed-read->authz-enforcement-mi.why: A person only sees feed items they are authorized to see.

notification-inapp-deliver->session-vali.why: In-app notifications are shown to the authenticated principal.

notification-ui->app-shell-ui.why: The notification center and feed live in the app shell.

billing-subscription-model->org-model.why: A subscription belongs to an organization.

billing-checkout->billing-plan-model.why: Checkout selects a plan and seat quantity.

billing-checkout->billing-provider-integ.why: Checkout completes payment via the provider.

billing-checkout->billing-subscription-m.why: Checkout creates/updates the org's subscription record.

billing-webhook-handler->billing-provide.why: The handler reconciles events from the provider.

billing-webhook-handler->billing-subscri.why: Webhook reconciliation updates the subscription record.

seat-count-enforcement->billing-subscrip.why: Enforcement compares headcount against paid seat quantity.

seat-quantity-sync->billing-subscription.why: Seat sync updates the subscription's seat quantity.

seat-quantity-sync->billing-provider-int.why: Seat sync pushes quantity changes to the provider.

billing-ui->billing-checkout.why: The UI drives plan/seat selection and checkout.

billing-checkout->authz-enforcement-midd.why: Only owners may subscribe/pay; checkout is privilege-gated.

seat-count-enforcement->org-membership-m.why: Enforcement counts active members against paid seats.

seat-count-enforcement->invite-model.why: Outstanding invites count toward consumed seats.

invite-create->seat-count-enforcement.why: Inviting is blocked when paid seats are exhausted.

invite-accept->seat-count-enforcement.why: Accepting is blocked when it would exceed paid seats.

seat-quantity-sync->org-membership-model.why: Membership growth/shrink drives billed seat quantity.

seat-quantity-sync->invite-create.why: Adding to the team (invites) is reflected in billed seats.

seat-quantity-sync->member-remove.why: Letting people go is reflected in billed seats.

billing-ui->app-shell-ui.why: Billing management lives in the authenticated app shell.

billing-ui->authz-ui-gating.why: Billing affordances are shown only to owners.

app-shell-ui->session-validate-middlewar.why: The app shell only routes authenticated principals.

authz-ui-gating->session-validate-middle.why: UI gating needs the resolved principal and their role.

org-create->session-validate-middleware.why: Creating an org requires an authenticated principal.

billing-checkout->org-model.why: Subscribing is scoped to the caller's organization.

team-manage->tenant-scoping.why: Team management is scoped to the caller's org.
